name: Broiled Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the first 7 ingredients and 1 1/2 tablespoons of oil. Cover and refrigerate for 2 to 8 hours.
2. Broil chicken until no longer pink in the center.
3. Meanwhile, saute green peppers and onions in remaining oil until crisp-tender.
4. Add tomatoes and saute 1 minute.
5. Stir in picante sauce and heat through.
6. Cut chicken into thin strips and top with vegetables.
7. Serve with four hot corn tortillas.
